title: The Curious Tourist
learningGoal: The learner will verbally point out objects using demonstrative pronouns and ask questions about them.
instructions: In this roleplay, you are a curious tourist pointing at objects in a shop. Speak your lines out loud in Japanese based on the provided prompts. Make sure to use the correct 'Ko-So-A-Do' word depending on how far the object is from you.

contentItems.text: Remember to end your questions with the particle 'ka'.

speakingPrompt: Ask what an object is, confirm what a far away object is, and state that a nearby object is the same thing.
scenario: You are pointing at various traditional items in a Japanese souvenir shop.

subTasks.prompt: Point at an object right in front of you. Ask: 'What is this?'.

sampleResponse.targetText: これは なんですか。

subTasks.prompt: Point at an object far away on the top shelf. Ask: 'Is that over there a clock?'.

sampleResponse.targetText: あれは とけいですか。
sampleResponse.baseTranslation: Is that over there a clock?

subTasks.prompt: Pick up another clock right next to you. Say: 'This is ALSO a clock.'

sampleResponse.targetText: これも とけいです。

baselineTranscriptSentences.targetText: これは なんですか。
あれは とけいですか。
baselineTranscriptSentences.baseTranslation: Is that over there a clock?

baselineTranscriptSentences.targetText: これも とけいです。

expectedSpeakingPoints: Say Kore wa nan desu ka
Say Are wa tokei desu ka
acceptableParaphrases: Sumimasen can be added to the beginning.

criteria.name: Demonstrative Accuracy
criteria.description: Did the learner correctly distinguish between Kore (near) and Are (far)?

criteria.name: Particle Accuracy
criteria.description: Did the learner use 'ka' for questions and 'mo' for also?

adminCorrectAnswerSet.sampleAnswer: これは なんですか。あれは とけいですか。これも とけいです。

feedbackRules.onPass: Excellent! You confidently pointed out objects and asked questions.
feedbackRules.onFail: Make sure you used 'Kore' for things near you, and 'Are' for things far away.
feedbackRules.onPartial: Good effort! Remember that 'What is it' is 'Nan desu ka'.

audioAssets.audioTranscript: いらっしゃいませ。これは なんですか。あれは とけいですか。これも とけいです。

hintText: Pay close attention to the third sentence. You must use 'mo' to mean 'also'.
commonMistakes: Saying 'Are wa tokei desu' without adding 'ka' at the end to make it a question.
